content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.59%, Bank Nifty -0.97%, VIX +2.89% to 17.10 — broad market soft but our book is in mid-cap Q4-earnings winners that are bucking the tape (COFORGE +14.88%, SRF +10.55%, PIDILITIND +8.79%, POLYCAB +9.64%, BHARATFORG +8.31%). Many holdings just had vertical moves on results — priority is to lock in gains via SL trails, not chase fresh entries. HFCL pending order from morning is stale (55+ hours old per timestamp, likely a data artifact but the symbol isn't in current research); cancel.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24350
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1045.00,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+9% unrealized. Current SL 1064.67 is ~2.6% below CMP 1072.90 — trail floor 1.0% (≈1062). Lifting SL to 1045 is actually LOOSER than 1064.67, which the engine will reject. Re-stating: keep SL at 1064.67 effectively. Correction below — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "reasoning": "Override prior MODIFY: current SL 1064.67 already locks in +8.2% gain on entry 984; CMP 1072.90 only 0.8% above SL, but tightening further would breach 1% trail-gap floor. Hold position with current SL; allow normal volatility. Stock at 1059-1089 day range, doji on May 5 suggests consolidation post-rally."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "reasoning": "Defensive ETF -0.4%. SL 121 holds. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4700.00,
      "new_target": 5000.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "+3.8% gain. Stored SL 4725.56 sits at 99.3% of CMP 4758 — within 1% trail-gap floor and risks self-stopout on normal noise. Loosening slightly to 4700 (1.2% below CMP) preserves position through May 14 board-meeting binary. WAIT — Rule states SL can only be tightened, not loosened. Cannot lower SL from 4725 to 4700. Actual issue: stored SL 4725.56 is dangerously tight to CMP 4758 (gap 0.7%). Cannot loosen, cannot tighten further sensibly. Real action per Rule 11 binary catalyst: May 14 board meeting is in 4 trading sessions — borderline of 3-session rule. Holding through with tight SL is acceptable risk-cap. HOLD with current SL and accept potential stopout as planned."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "Override: cannot loosen SL (Rule prohibits). Stored SL 4725.56 is 0.7% below CMP — tight but already locked in +3.3% gain. May 14 board meeting in 4 sessions (just outside 3-session binary window). Accept that normal noise may trigger SL; that's the planned downside cap on this winner."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+0.9% gain. Stored SL 822 is ABOVE CMP 827.40 by only ~0.6% (i.e., SL 822 < CMP 827.40 — SL is below CMP by 0.6%, within 1% trail-gap risk). Cannot loosen SL. Current SL 822 stays. HOLD effectively. Correction:"
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "Override: SL 822 is 0.65% below CMP 827.40 — tight but cannot loosen. Q4 PAT +18%, MOFSL TP 950. Hold for upside; SL acts as breakeven+ floor."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1310.00,
      "new_target": 1395.00,
      "confidence": 0.8,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "+6.7%. Stored SL 1329.47 is BELOW CMP 1343.80 by only 1.07% — at the trail-gap floor, fine. Cannot loosen to 1310. Keep current SL. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.8,
      "reasoning": "Override: SL 1329.47 is 1.07% below CMP 1343.80 — at trail-gap floor, locked-in +5.6% gain. PAT multifold jump, PL Capital TP 2020. Hold for run toward 1395 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 3030.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+1.6% gain on entry 3025, CMP 3082.80. Current SL 3025 (at entry/breakeven). Tightening to 3030 lifts SL above breakeven by Rs 5 (negligible micro-adjust below 0.5% threshold — would be wasted signal). HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "reasoning": "Override: SL 3025 at entry. CMP 3082.80, gap 1.9% — within tolerance. FY26 revenue +38%, PAT +41.8%, Antique TP 3141. Holding to target 3225."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 832.00,
      "new_target": 875.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "+4.2% gain. Stored SL 827.41 is 1.7% below CMP 842.35 — within 1% floor of trail. Tightening to 832 (1.2% below CMP) locks in +3.2% gain while preserving reasonable noise tolerance. R:R from current: risk 10.35 vs reward 32.65 = 3.15x. Tightening is allowed (raising SL on long)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "-0.7%, well within SL 1445 (-3% from entry). Q4 PAT +36.6%, Seafarer meet May 13. Thesis intact, hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "reasoning": "-2.5% drawdown but SL 2370 (-3.7% from entry) intact. Q4 PAT +87.5%, US sales +46%, 900% dividend, Glycerol USFDA approval — thesis very much intact. Q4 earnings call tomorrow (May 8) — slight pullback today is normal post-spike consolidation. Per Rule 17, do NOT preempt SL on intraday wobble. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "-0.4%, well within SL 1580. Q4 turnaround (PAT +Rs 164cr vs loss), Zaynich USFDA pending. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2740.00,
      "new_target": 2920.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "+0.3% only. Stored SL 2725 (-2.2% from entry 2785). CMP 2792.20. Tightening SL to 2740 (1.9% below CMP, locks in marginal gain near breakeven) following +10.5% intraday spike — protects against gap-down reversal. R:R: risk 52 vs reward 128 = 2.46x."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "+0.5% gain. SL 9000 (-1.1% from entry, 1.6% below CMP 9148.50). Thesis intact (revenue +27%, dividend Rs 47, MOFSL TP 9800-10500). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "reasoning": "-0.6%, SL 1955 (-3% from entry) intact. Q4 PAT -17% (impairment-driven) but defence segment +46%, FY27 guidance +25%. Mixed print but thesis still has legs. Hold to SL or target."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "reasoning": "Pending HFCL BUY @ 133.50 has been OPEN for 3328 minutes (~55 hours, likely stale across sessions). HFCL is not in current watchlist research and tape is soft today. Should be cancelled — but CANCEL action is not in current schema for this slot; flagging for portfolio review. Treating as NO_ACTION; will revisit if order remains stale next cycle."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1064.67 already locks +8.2% gain; further tighten would breach 1% trail-gap. Hold."
    },
    {

      "current_action": "HOLD",

      "reasoning": "Defensive holding. SL 121 intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 4725.56 tight (0.7% below CMP) but cannot loosen. May 14 board meeting in 4 sessions. Accept SL as planned cap."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 822 is below entry breakeven, cannot loosen. Q4 strong, hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1329.47 at trail-floor (1.07% below CMP). Hold for target 1395."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 3025 at entry breakeven, gap to CMP 1.9%. Hold for 3225."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 832.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL from 827.41 to 832 — locks in +3.2% gain, gap to CMP 1.2% (above floor)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Slight drawdown -0.7%, SL 1445 intact. Q4 +36.6% thesis live."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Worst position at -2.5% but SL 2370 holds. Earnings call May 8 catalyst. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Marginal -0.4%, thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 2740.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten from 2725 to 2740 post +10.5% intraday spike to lock near-breakeven."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Marginal gain, SL 9000 intact, thesis strong."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Mixed Q4 but defence segment +46% and FY27 guide intact. SL 1955 holds."

  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Multiple Q4 earnings winners on the watchlist (FINCABLES +8%, BHARATFORG +8%, KPIL +2%, etc.) — but book is already at 63% deployed across 13 positions with significant capital-goods/specialty-chem exposure and several names just had vertical post-result moves. Adding to a chasing-to-ATH cluster on a -0.6% Nifty / VIX +3% day is poor timing. FINCABLES (Q4 results May 10, 2 sessions = binary) — Rule 11 disqualifies new entry. KPIL (Q4 May 12-14, 2-4 sessions) — same. THERMAX +14% gap-up, no entry. Tracking for fresh re-evaluation tomorrow post-LUPIN call.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is well-diversified across earnings winners (PNBHOUSING +9%, COFORGE +6.7%, CAMS +4.2%, HAL +3.8%) and modest losers (LUPIN -2.5%, BHARATFORG -0.6%, PIDILITIND -0.7%) all within SL bounds. Total unrealized +Rs 11,552 with realized +Rs 1,524 today. Book carrying solid Q4-earnings momentum exposure. Stale HFCL pending order from prior session needs cancellation in next cycle. Cumulative experiment P&L just turned positive at +0.98% — preserve gains by NOT chasing more entries today on a soft-tape day."
}
